title: [ci]: ERROR: Releases must never contain '-dev' in output of 'podman info'  (contrib/cirrus/runner.sh:203 in _run_release())

comments.body: Sorry for the delay, I was on PTO. I can't figure out what this is referring to? It seems like that PR is merged, so you must've figured out the cause?

> Sorry for the delay, I was on PTO. I can't figure out what this is referring to? It seems like that PR is merged, so you must've figured out the cause?

Before that, almost every step in pr will report an error, you can check the related issue of the link
